ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data entry */,
  "duration_hours" INTEGER /* Duration in hours relevant to the data point */,
  "return_period_years" INTEGER /* Return period in years for the data point */,
  "lower_limit_historical_ci" REAL /* Lower limit of historical confidence interval (95%) */,
  "mean_historical_ci" REAL /* Ensemble mean of historical confidence interval (95%) */,
  "upper_limit_historical_ci" REAL /* Upper limit of historical confidence interval (95%) */,
  "lower_limit_rcp85_ci" REAL /* Lower limit of RCP8.5 confidence interval (95%) */,
  "mean_rcp85_ci" REAL /* Ensemble mean of RCP8.5 confidence interval (95%) */,
  "upper_limit_rcp85_ci" REAL /* Upper limit of RCP8.5 confidence interval (95%) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the data location */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model used */,
  "rcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RCP scenario used */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the climate data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_rcp_id FOREIGN KEY ("rcp_id") REFERENCES rcp_scenarios ("rcp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query executed (e.g., filter, aggregate) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the climate model */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the climate model (e.g., global, regional) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of climate model (e.g., GCM, RCM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rcp_scenarios" (
  "rcp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RCP scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the RCP scenario (e.g., RCP8.5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the RCP scenario */,
  "emission_level" REAL /* Projected greenhouse gas concentration level */,
  "projection_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the projection is made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the report */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., research, review) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the visualization is associated with */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., graph, chart) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization image or document */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES analysis_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the researcher */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate variable */,
  "variable_description" TEXT /* Description of the climate variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data_variables" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate variable */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the climate variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "variable_id")
)
